need.title: Need a weighing solution?
need.sub: Contact us instantly on WhatsApp — quick quotes, friendly advice.

hero.subtitle: Complete Weighing Solution for Retail, Dairy & Industrial Segments. Durable build and unmatched accuracy for retail, industrial, dairy and commercial use.

about.p1: Siddarama Tech Solution is a Tumkur-based provider of premium weighing systems under the Jioo brand. We operate across Karnataka and serve customers all over India through our dealer network — supplying advanced scales for retail, dairy, industrial and commercial operations.
about.p2: Every product we ship is tested for precision, calibrated for real-world conditions, and backed by hands-on service from our team.

prod.title: A weighing system for every need
prod.subtitle: From compact counter scales to heavy-duty 4 load cell platforms — premium build, dependable accuracy.

tabletop.name: Tabletop Scale
tabletop.desc: Compact, accurate counter scale ideal for retail counters, jewellery and small parcels.

portable.name: Portable Scale
portable.desc: Take-anywhere precision for couriers, farmers and on-site weighing.

platform.name: Platform Scale
platform.desc: Workhorse platform scale built for warehouses, mandis and shop floors.

loadcell.name: 4 Load Cell Platform Scale
loadcell.desc: Precision-engineered industrial scale for heavy loads, drums and pallets.

why.title: Engineered for performance. Delivered with care.

f1.d: Calibrated precision you can trust on every weighing — verified before dispatch.

f2.d: Heavy-duty builds engineered for retail, industrial and outdoor use.

f3.d: Modern load cells, bright displays and smart connectivity options.

f4.d: Straightforward pricing with no surprises — premium quality, fair value.

contact.title: Let's find the right scale for you
contact.sub: Tell us a bit about your requirement and we'll get back fast.
